requirement_topic.en: Electrical safety and product standard baseline for refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 电冰箱电气安全与适用标准基础
requirement_topic.zht: 電冰箱電氣安全與適用標準基礎

summary.en: Indonesia references SNI-aligned safety expectations equivalent to IEC 60335-2-24 for refrigerators and requires proper SNI marking controls. In practice, the local check also assumes operating assumptions aligned to 230 V, 50 Hz appliances, and model declarations that match imported variants.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚以SNI框架采纳与IEC 60335-2-24等效的安全要求，并要求在合规条件下使用SNI标志。实际检核也常按230V 50Hz运行条件处理，需与进口型号匹配。
summary.zht: 印尼以SNI架構採納與IEC 60335-2-24等效的安全要求，並要求在合規條件下使用SNI標誌。實際檢核也常按230V 50Hz運行條件處理，需與進口機型匹配。

standards_or_laws: SNI standard framework for refrigerator electrical safety and product marking
IEC 60335-2-24 alignment through adopted SNI references
Grid compatibility and installation assumptions in Indonesian technical review

summary.en: China commonly documents electrical safety under GB 4706.13 and GB 4706.1 with CCC marking. These tests are useful for engineering comparison but do not automatically satisfy Indonesia's SNI plus marking regime.
summary.zh: 中国通常按GB 4706.13和GB 4706.1提交CCC电气安全资料。该类测试可用于技术比较，但不能自动满足印尼SNI和SNI标志制度要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常按GB 4706.13和GB 4706.1提交CCC電氣安全資料。該類測試可用於技術比較，但不能自動滿足印尼SNI和SNI標誌制度要求。

standards_or_laws: China CCC safety certification path for electrical appliances
GB 4706.1 and GB 4706.13 electrical safety framework

gap.en: Critical export gaps are plug and supply assumptions, protection settings, warning symbols, and local language manuals. The voltage mismatch risk (Chinese 220/380 V design families versus Indonesian 230 V single-phase use in this lane) is common when documents are reused without a mode mapping.
gap.zh: 关键差异在于插头与供电假设、防护设置、警示符号及本地语言说明书。由于中国常见220/380V设计家族与印尼本场景230V单相工况并存，若未做模式映射直接复用文件会有风险。
gap.zht: 關鍵差異在於插頭與供電假設、保護設定、警示符號及本地語言說明書。由於中國常見220/380V設計家族與印尼本場景230V單相工況並存，若未做模式映射直接複用文件會有風險。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope imported refrigerators under safety and market-entry controls.
mandatory_status.cn: CCC safety evidence remains domestic and does not replace Indonesia-specific SNI-mark review and filing.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Rebuild safety declarations for the exact Indonesian 230V deployment variant. Confirm plug, warning labels, and user manuals against the final SNI submission package before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 请按印尼230V投放场景重建安全声明，确认插头、警示标签和说明书与最终SNI申报包一致后再出运。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 請按印尼230V投放場景重建安全聲明，確認插頭、警示標籤和說明書與最終SNI申報包一致後再出運。
